subject: feat(admin): add bulk import stations via JSON paste/file upload
body:
Adds a new admin screen for importing multiple stations at once.
Two input methods: paste JSON directly or upload a .json file.
Client-side validation with per-station error preview before import.
Server-side RPC function handles PostGIS coordinate construction
and atomic batch insert.

Tags: admin, bulk-import, supabase, rpc
Complexity: 3
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: neutral
Epic: admin-station-management
Semver: minor

title: add bulk import stations via JSON paste/file upload
